title: matisia alata subsp. alata
intro: Matisia alata subsp. alata is a species of flowering plant in the family Malvaceae, commonly known as the velvet tree or velvet mallow due to its soft, velvety leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Matisia alata subsp. alata include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and roots can be used in traditional herbal remedies.
